class.name: PckCreator
class.brief_description: Create and build Godot PCK archive files.

method.name: add_files
method.description: Adds files to the in-progress archive. [param file_paths_to_pack] maps source filesystem paths to their destination [code]res://[/code] paths inside the archive (e.g. [code]{"/abs/path/to/file.gd": "res://scripts/file.gd"}[/code]). Returns [code]OK[/code] on success, or an error code if any file could not be read.

method.name: finish_pck
method.description: Finalizes and writes the PCK archive to disk. Call this after [method start_pck] and all [method add_files] calls. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success.

method.name: get_error_message
method.description: Returns a human-readable description of the last error.

method.name: pck_create
method.description: Convenience method that creates a complete PCK archive in a single call. Packs every file under [param dir] into a new archive at [param pck_path]. [param include_filters] and [param exclude_filters] are arrays of glob patterns (rooted to [code]res://[/code]) that control which files are included - exclusion wins over inclusion when both lists are supplied. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success.

method.name: reset
method.description: Resets the creator state so the instance can be reused for a new archive. Restores [member pack_version], [member ver_major], [member ver_minor], and [member ver_rev] to their defaults and clears any accumulated file list.

method.name: start_pck
method.description: Begins a new PCK archive at [param pck_path]. [param pck_version] is the PCK format version ([code]0[/code], [code]1[/code], or [code]2[/code]). [param ver_major], [param ver_minor], and [param ver_rev] populate the engine-version fields of the archive header. Set [param encrypt] to [code]true[/code] to encrypt file contents with the key configured on [GDRESettings]. Set [param embed] to [code]true[/code] and provide [param exe_to_embed] to append the PCK to an executable. [param watermark] embeds an optional identifying string in the header.

members.member: When [code]true[/code], the PCK is embedded into the executable specified by [member exe_to_embed].
When [code]true[/code], file data inside the archive is encrypted using the key configured on [GDRESettings].
Path to the executable to embed the PCK into. Only used when [member embed] is [code]true[/code].
The PCK format version to write. Valid values are [code]0[/code], [code]1[/code], and [code]2[/code].
The major engine version written into the PCK header.
The minor engine version written into the PCK header.
The patch/revision engine version written into the PCK header.
An optional string embedded in the archive header for identification purposes.
